title: Battle Arts
description: Expanding the Epic Fight Mod with Unique Styles and Weapon Capabilities!
body:
![Title of Battle Arts Update](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31e71c51ff0c5efe11308bed950e4a2935a315c0.png)

![Mod Focus](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/965336a12e47a6fc9032bcebe4270d96b02cfc2e.png)

![Four Battle Styles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ffd3293e869af430baf606553e3483f404694ed.png)
![Novice Tier](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de7c2357b13fabdb69ce4f64c9ac84b604040049.png)

Squire: A battle style that is focused on the techniques of a mercenary, with a focus on swords, daggers, bows, alongside cavalry skills.

Recruit: A battle style focused on military techniques like spears, crossbows, shields and the donning of armor to withstand hits.

Journeyman: A battle style that is based off the techniques of the civilian and fighters, wielding heavy weapons like axes, and even fighting unarmed. Repeated use of heavier weapons makes these people incredibly powerful and healthy.

![Intermediate Tier](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76b5b0ebbe0bec0400bfbaca5f7b3d7d6bcb91b7.png)

Ronin: A battle style that is focused on Japanese weaponry, they focus on doing high damage with speed bursts. With high speed high power katana and tachi attacks. Quite fragile.

 ![Contributing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86d98a5552b07382217cded87d6ab5fb66e0591f.png)

You are free to contribute to Epic Fight Battle Styles. All animations and visual works will be credited and will have the right license given to them.

Source is available on GitHub

![Licensing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e13b6192644eea096f4b7ee1195807bf60df210b.png)

The source code is available under the MIT License. Animations and Textures made by Forixaim are CC-BY-SA. Any third-party assets will have their respective licenses if requested to have one.

If you would like to support me financially so I can keep making content you can do so here.
